description: Legal document (zikhron ʿedut). Dated: Thursday, 13 Elul 1528 Seleucid, which is 18 August 1217 CE. Settlement of the payment of a mu'akhkhar in installments. A total of 15 dinars is reduced to 10, to be paid from the beginning of Shevat in weekly installments of 3 dirhams. For the divorcee's children, 5 1/4 dirhams are to be paid every week from the beginning of Tishrei for the period of 1 year. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי (זיכרון עדות); מתוארך: חמישי, 13 לאלול 1528 שטרות = 18 באוגוסט 1217 לספירה; הסדר תשלום מאוחר; 15 דינרים מופחתים ל-10, פרעון שבועי
